name: Dragon
phrases: ROARRR!
What a pathetic little morsel!
You dare steal from MY hoard?
I'll reduce you to ash!
I have lived for a thousand years!
My scales are harder than your sword!
Bow before ancient dragon-kind!
Your bones will join my collection!
INHALE the fire!
You think you can defeat me?
I am older than your oldest legend!
My hoard grows with your gold!
Adventurers taste delicious!
Your armor is no match for my flame!
Every moment, I grow stronger!
I've crushed kingdoms, silly human!
My fire melts everything!
Count yourself blessed I'm bored!
This treasure is MINE!
I can smell your fear from here!
Did you really think you'd escape?
I've seen empires crumble to dust!
Your greatest weapons are my toys!
I'll incinerate you where you stand!
My hoard is more precious than your world!
Centuries of hunger drive me!
None have survived my wrath!
I am ETERNAL!
Your end comes swiftly now!
Ash will be all that remains!
